description_long: This is a modern, multi-level house with a flat roof and a geometric, rectilinear design. The structure features a combination of white and gray exterior surfaces, with large horizontal windows and a prominent entryway. The house is set on a green plot with a paved driveway leading to a garage, and landscaped areas are visible around the perimeter. The building's facade is characterized by clean lines, cantilevered sections, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall appearance is sleek and minimalist, typical of modern residential architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white and gray exterior, large windows, and a geometric, minimalist design set on a landscaped plot with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side of the house, garage entrance, and landscaped yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the full length of the driveway.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the entryway, driveway, and more of the landscaped area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent main entryway with steps, a flat overhang, and large glass panels
